content:
## Page Section / Title
Elements  
1.1 Elements  
CHAPTER SHAPES  


## All Verbatim Text
- **Header**: Brand Visual Guidelines | by Sightbox  
- **Section Title**: 1.1 Elements  
- **Subsection Title**: CHAPTER SHAPES  
- **Body Copy**: The CHAPTERS shapes take colors from the city’s illustration, but one face of the polyhedron must always feature the brand’s gradient to maintain visual consistency.  
- **Color Labels**:  
  - AIS GRADIENT  
  - #265E73  
  - #9CC3C5  
  - #E04945  


## Visual Elements
### Logos
- **Sightbox Logo**: Small, geometric black icon (two stacked rectangles with a horizontal line) in the top-right corner.  
- **AIS Gradient Icon**: Circular gradient swatch (purple-to-blue) labeled "AIS GRADIENT" with a connecting line to the polyhedron.  

### Color Palette
- **AIS GRADIENT**: Gradient (purple-to-blue, no specific HEX/RGB provided, but implied as a brand gradient).  
- **#265E73**: Dark teal (labeled on the polyhedron’s blue face).  
- **#9CC3C5**: Light teal (labeled on the polyhedron’s light blue face).  
- **#E04945**: Red (labeled on the polyhedron’s red face).  

### Typography
- **Headings**: Bold, sans-serif typeface (e.g., "Elements", "CHAPTER SHAPES").  
- **Body Copy**: Regular, sans-serif typeface (e.g., the paragraph under "CHAPTER SHAPES").  
- **Color Labels**: Small, sans-serif typeface (e.g., "#265E73", "AIS GRADIENT").  

### Imagery / Photography
- **Illustration**: Low-polygon (geometric) style of a traditional East Asian pagoda (multi-tiered roof, red/orange structure) set against a gradient sky (blue-to-pink). The pagoda is embedded within a large, irregular polyhedron (3D shape) with colored faces.  

### Iconography
- **AIS Gradient Icon**: Circular, gradient-filled (purple-to-blue) with a thin black outline.  
- **Color Dots**: Small circular markers (matching the color of the polyhedron’s face) with thin black outlines, connected by lines to color labels.  

### Layout Grid
- **Column Structure**: Two-column layout (left: text; right: illustration).  
- **Margins**: Generous white space around the polyhedron and text.  
- **Spacing**: Clean, minimal spacing between elements (text aligned left, illustration centered right).  

### Geometric / Decorative Elements
- **Polyhedron**: Large, irregular 3D shape (polyhedron) with flat, colored faces (teal, light teal, red, gradient). The shape frames the pagoda illustration.  
- **Gradient Faces**: One face of the polyhedron features the "AIS GRADIENT" (purple-to-blue).  


## Page Layout Summary
- **Left Side**: Text content (section title, subsection title, body copy) aligned to the left, with generous white space.  
- **Right Side**: Central illustration (polyhedron with pagoda) taking up most of the right half, with color labels and gradient icon positioned around it.  
- **Top**: Header ("Brand Visual Guidelines | by Sightbox") and Sightbox logo aligned to the top-left and top-right, respectively.  
- **Overall**: Balanced, clean layout with a focus on the geometric illustration and color guidance.  


## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- **CHAPTER SHAPES Rule**: "The CHAPTERS shapes take colors from the city’s illustration, but one face of the polyhedron must always feature the brand’s gradient to maintain visual consistency."  
- **Color Usage**: Specific colors (#265E73, #9CC3C5, #E04945) are labeled on the polyhedron’s faces, indicating their designated use.  
- **Gradient Requirement**: The "AIS GRADIENT" must be included on at least one face of the polyhedron for visual consistency.
